heygen_script:
Welcome to McMurray Fabrics, your premier destination for Textile manufacturer - nets, webbing, automotive textiles.

What sets us apart: Established 1968 - 58+ years in textile manufacturing

Visit us today and experience the quality that has made us a local favorite.

McMurray Fabrics - Quality Service, Every Time.
